mapper.select: SELECT t1.ID, t1.SETTLEMENT_NO, t1.MAINT_ORG_ID, t1.MAINT_ORG_NAME, t1.PROJECT_TYPE, t1.TOTAL_BUDGET_AMOUNT, t1.TOTAL_ACTUAL_AMOUNT, t1.APPLY_USER_ID, t1.APPLY_USER_NAME, t1.APPLY_TIME, t1.REMARK, t1.CREATE_BY, t1.CREATE_BY_NAME, t1.CREATE_TIME, t1.UPDATE_BY, t1.UPDATE_BY_NAME, t1.UPDATE_TIME, t3.PROC_INST_ID, CASE WHEN t3.INSTANCE_STATUS IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE t3.INSTANCE_STATUS END AS processStatus, CASE WHEN t2.DICT_LABEL IS NULL THEN '未发起' ELSE t2.DICT_LABEL END AS processStatusLabel FROM E_COST_SETTLEMENT_APPLY t1 LEFT JOIN BPM_BUSINESS_INSTANCE t3 ON t3.BUSINESS_DATA_ID = t1.ID LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA t2 ON t2.DICT_VALUE = t3.INSTANCE_STATUS AND t2.DICT_TYPE = 'APPROVAL_STATUS' WHERE t1.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_COST_SETTLEMENT_APPLY ( ID, SETTLEMENT_NO, MAINT_ORG_ID, MAINT_ORG_NAME, PROJECT_TYPE, TOTAL_BUDGET_AMOUNT, TOTAL_ACTUAL_AMOUNT, APPLY_USER_ID, APPLY_USER_NAME, APPLY_TIME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{settlementNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{maintOrgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{maintOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totalBudgetAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{totalActualAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{applyUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{applyUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_COST_SETTLEMENT_APPLY
MAINT_ORG_ID = #{maintOrgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
MAINT_ORG_NAME = #{maintOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PROJECT_TYPE = #{projectType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TOTAL_BUDGET_AMOUNT = #{totalBudgetAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
TOTAL_ACTUAL_AMOUNT = #{totalActualAmount,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
APPLY_USER_ID = #{applyUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
APPLY_USER_NAME = #{applyUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
APPLY_TIME = #{applyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT BUSINESS_DATA_ID FROM BPM_BUSINESS_INSTANCE WHERE PROC_INST_ID = #{processInstanceId}
